title: K-200 Nav/GNC Risk Register
text:
# K-200 Nav/GNC Risk Register

Document number: MD-DOC-453-F. Revision: F. Type: analysis. Author: Marcus Thaine. Created: 2024-08-20. Last modified: 2025-08-20. Status: Released.

This document defines the requirements, interfaces, and verification approach for the Nav/GNC subsystem of the Kestrel K-200. Referenced parts: P-1058, P-1083, P-1064, P-1107.
